description: Style NoteThe Spanish influences in the design details of this sandal is the reason for the Spanish name. Subtle, pastel hues, super soft footbed styling and classic designs with a sophisticated polish, style this pair with kohl-rimmed eyes and an ethno-western ensemble!Heel: 2.5"Product DetailsSolomon pink and brown sandal with midfoot straps and a toe separatorSoft footbed with branding on the heelTextured TPU outsole with a heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
